# `btpc edit`

<!-- Generated by `scripts/generate-cli-reference.sh`; do not edit. -->

Edit metainfo metadata without reading payload files

**Parent:** [`btpc`](index.md)

See [Configuration and global flags](../configuration.md) and [Exit codes and streams](../index.md#exit-codes-and-streams).

## Synopsis

```text
Usage: btpc edit [OPTIONS] <INPUT>
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `<INPUT>` | Metainfo file to edit |

## Options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `-o, --output, <OUTPUT>` | Write the edited metainfo to this path |
| `--in-place` | Replace the input file atomically Default: `false`. |
| `-f, --force` | Replace an existing output file Default: `false`. |
| `--durable` | Sync the destination directory after publication where supported Default: `false`. |
| `--dry-run` | Validate and report changes without writing output Default: `false`. |
| `--diff` | Print a deterministic field-level change summary Default: `false`. |
| `--json` | Emit a versioned JSON result to stdout Default: `false`. |
| `-a, --tracker, <TRACKERS>` | Replace trackers with this tracker tier; may be repeated |
| `--tracker-alias, <TRACKER_ALIASES>` | Add a configured tracker alias; may be repeated |
| `--tracker-group, <TRACKER_GROUPS>` | Add a configured tracker group; may be repeated |
| `--clear-trackers` | Remove all trackers Default: `false`. |
| `--web-seed, <WEB_SEEDS>` | Replace web seeds with this URL; may be repeated |
| `--clear-web-seeds` | Remove all web seeds Default: `false`. |
| `--node, <NODES>` | Replace DHT nodes with HOST:PORT; may be repeated |
| `--clear-nodes` | Remove all DHT nodes Default: `false`. |
| `--comment, <COMMENT>` | Set the top-level comment |
| `--clear-comment` | Remove the top-level comment Default: `false`. |
| `--created-by, <CREATED_BY>` | Set the creator string |
| `--clear-created-by` | Remove the creator string Default: `false`. |
| `--creation-date, <CREATION_DATE>` | Set the Unix creation timestamp |
| `--clear-creation-date` | Remove the creation timestamp Default: `false`. |
| `--private` | Set the private flag Default: `false`. |
| `--public` | Set the private flag to false Default: `false`. |
| `--clear-private` | Remove the private field Default: `false`. |
| `--source, <SOURCE>` | Set the source field |
| `--clear-source` | Remove the source field Default: `false`. |
| `--file-attributes, <FILE_ATTRIBUTES>` | Set file attributes as PATH=ATTRS; may be repeated |
| `-h, --help` | Print help |

## Global options

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--config, <PATH>` | Use this configuration file when configuration loading is enabled |
| `--no-config` | Disable implicit and environment-selected configuration Default: `false`. |
| `--color, <COLOR>` | Control colored terminal output Values: `auto`, `always`, `never`. |
| `-v, --verbose` | Increase diagnostic verbosity; may be repeated Default: `0`. |
| `-q, --quiet` | Suppress human summaries, warnings, and progress Default: `false`. |

## Example

```console
$ btpc edit --help
```
